title: Rich Savory Portuguese Ackee Lasagna
description: A savory Portuguese dish featuring ackee and a mother sauce base, perfect for a plant-based friendly meal. This show-off dish is sure to impress with its cheese pull and rich flavors.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cook the lasagna noodles according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the onion and garlic until softened.
Add the plant-based portuguese sausage to the skillet and cook until browned.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked ackee, mother sauce, and cooked sausage mixture.
In a 9x13 inch baking dish, create a thin layer of the mother sauce.
Arrange 4 lasagna noodles on top of the sauce.
Spread half of the ackee and sausage mixture over the noodles.
Sprinkle with half of the vegan mozzarella cheese.
Repeat the layers, starting with the noodles, then the remaining ackee and sausage mixture, and finally the remaining cheese.
Cover the baking dish with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
